prompt:
In the Ruff codebase, the pyflakes checker module uses a struct called `Checker`. Find ALL files that import or reference `pyflakes::Checker` and list them. Then rename the struct from `Checker` to `PyflakesChecker` in all locations where it is defined and referenced, ensuring the code still compiles.

Do not rename any other `Checker` structs from other linter modules.

metadata.description: Large Rust codebase with many similarly-named structs. Tests whether semantic search helps disambiguate specific Checker from the many Checker types.
